sections.content: Let me check the current state. The white diamond should now be at (59, 27) and the dark gray square at (53, 28) after clicking the dark gray square.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']

print("=== Key objects ===")
for n in nodes:
    c = n['color']
    if c in ['W', 'p', 'M', 'G'] and n['pixels'] <= 20:
        if n['boundary']:
            rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
            cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
            center = f"~({sum(rows)//len(rows)}, {sum(cols)//len(cols)})"
        else:
            center = "?"
        print(f"  {c} id={n['id']} px={n['pixels']} children={n['children']} {center}")

# Check if level completed
print(f"\nLevel completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed', False)}")
print(f"Game over: {last_action_result.get('game_over', False)}")
print(f"Done: {last_action_result.get('done', False)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
